DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: deactivate the inhibition of Auto Stop by ABS malfunction(00h)
lists.1: activate the inhibition of Auto Stop by ABS malfunction(01h)
